description: A Clinical Nurse Specialist has drafted a quarterly patient education newsletter about Type 2 diabetes located at '/home/ga/Documents/diabetes_newsletter_draft.docx'. Reformat this document into a professional newsletter and save it to '/home/ga/Documents/diabetes_newsletter.docx'. The final document must feature 'Harmony Health Quarterly' as a centered Heading 1 title and 'Your Guide to Living Well with Type 2 Diabetes — Spring 2024' as a centered, italicized subtitle. The body of the newsletter should be formatted into two columns with approximately 0.3" spacing, separated from the single-column header by a continuous section break. Apply Heading 2 style to the article titles: 'Understanding Your Blood Sugar Numbers', 'Heart-Healthy Eating on a Budget', 'Staying Active: Exercise Tips for Every Ability Level', and 'Know Your Medications'. The paragraph starting 'Small changes today...' must be bold and italicized, while the final contact paragraph starting 'Harmony Community Health Center...' must be bold. Include a centered footer on all pages with the text: 'Harmony Community Health Center — (555) 234-5678 — www.harmonychc.org'.
